title: AIP Capture Certificate (v1)
description: Operator-signed declaration of the in-field conditions under which a piece of evidence was captured (Phase 2 / Door #2). Embeds the evidence's SHA-256, the capture time, device id, location, and the operator's signature. Verifiers recompute 'certificate_hash' as SHA-256(JCS(cert minus 'certificate_hash' and 'signature')) and verify 'signature' against the ed25519 public key whose SHA-256(DER SPKI) equals 'public_key_fingerprint'.

evidence_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex of the captured evidence bytes.

location.description: Optional, operator-supplied. No format enforced (e.g. 'MX-19.43,-99.13', 'Hangar B', UTM, etc.). Not verified against any external geolocation source.

notes.description: Optional free text. Will be included in 'certificate_hash'; editing changes the hash.

public_key_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex of the DER SPKI of the operator's ed25519 public key.

signature.description: ed25519 signature over JCS(cert minus 'certificate_hash' and 'signature'). 128 hex chars.

certificate_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of JCS(cert minus 'certificate_hash'). Recomputed by verifiers.
